description: Power supply unit failure on BTS-Site-0023
root_cause: The power supply unit on BTS-Site-0023 has failed, causing a power fault alarm.
resolution_steps: Replace the failed PSU from the spare parts inventory.
Check the PSU status LED to confirm the replacement resolves the issue.
Verify SNMP alarm clears after PSU replacement.
If no spare PSU is available, escalate to procurement immediately.
Coordinate with the facilities team if there is a commercial power issue.

description: Power supply unit failure on AccessSwitch-001
root_cause: The power supply unit on AccessSwitch-001 has failed.
resolution_steps: Replace the failed PSU from the spare parts inventory.
Prepare for emergency failover as this is a single PSU setup.
Check if there is a commercial power issue and coordinate with the facilities team if necessary.
If the issue is due to a UPS failure, dispatch an electrician immediately.

description: Physical link down on interface GigabitEthernet1/37
root_cause: Physical link failure is the most common cause for this type of alarm.
resolution_steps: Inspect and replace the cable connected to GigabitEthernet1/37.
Check and replace the SFP module if necessary.
Contact the upstream provider to verify if there are any issues on their end.
Verify the physical connections and ensure they are secure.
Check for any visible damage to the hardware.
